**Expected.** Book to track SPY with lower drawdown; new entries to come on pullbacks, not breakouts extended above the 20-day.

**Actual.** Outperformed SPY by ~150bps on the week, but the AMD entry chased an extended breakout and is now the weakest position.

**Lesson.** Prefer pullback entries to the rising 20/50-day over breakout chases; the latter widen the stop and degrade reward/risk.
